2603.17566.title: KA2L: A Knowledge-Aware Active Learning Framework for LLMs
2603.17566.paper_summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with high-quality knowledge has been shown to enhance their performance effectively. However, there is a paucity of research on the depth of domain-specific knowledge comprehension by LLMs and the application of targeted active learning to improve their expertise. To address this gap, we introduce the Knowledge-Aware Active Learning (KA2L) framework. This framework assesses LLMs' mastery of specific knowledge points to aid in constructing unanswerable or unknowable questions through latent space analysis. This active learning strategy enhances training efficiency by focusing on knowledge the model has yet to master, thereby minimizing redundancy in learning already acquired information. This study innovatively employs a knowledge distribution probing technique to examine the hidden states of specific Transformer layers and identify the distribution of known and unknown knowledge within the LLM. Additionally, a hidden-state decoding method is proposed to generate numerous unknown questions in natural language from the latent knowledge space. In our experiments, we selected nine open-source LLMs to validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Results indicate that KA2L not only significantly reduces 50% annotation and computation costs across two open-domain and one vertical-domain dataset but also achieves better performance, offering valuable insights into active learning strategies for LLMs. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/KA2L-F15C.
2603.17566.paper_summary_zh: 微調大型語言模型（LLMs）以高品質知識已被證明能有效提升其表現。然而，對於LLMs在特定領域知識理解的深度以及針對性主動學習應用以提升其專業知識的研究仍然稀缺。為了解決這一空白，我們引入了知識感知主動學習（KA2L）框架。該框架評估LLMs對特定知識點的掌握程度，以幫助通過潛在空間分析構建無法回答或未知的問題。這種主動學習策略通過專注於模型尚未掌握的知識來提高訓練效率，從而最小化對已獲得信息的學習冗餘。本研究創新性地採用了知識分佈探測技術，以檢查特定Transformer層的隱藏狀態，並識別LLM內已知和未知知識的分佈。此外，提出了一種隱藏狀態解碼方法，從潛在知識空間生成大量自然語言的未知問題。在我們的實驗中，我們選擇了九個開源LLMs來驗證所提出框架的有效性。結果表明，KA2L不僅在兩個開放領域和一個垂直領域數據集上顯著減少了50%的標註和計算成本，還實現了更好的性能，為LLMs的主動學習策略提供了有價值的見解。代碼可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/KA2L-F15C 獲得。
2603.17566.author: Haoxuan Yin et.al.
2603.17566.authors: Haoxuan Yin, Bojian Liu, Chen Tang, Yangfan Wang, Lian Yan, Jingchi Jiang
